subject: Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor trigger 743271526/240721680 is not a GRB
body:
C. Fletcher (USRA) reports on behalf of the Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 743271526/240721680 at 16:18:41.10 UT
on 21 July 2024, tentatively classified as a GRB, is in fact not due
to a GRB. This trigger is likely due to particle activity."
